title: Growing Stronger
subtitle: Development becomes more refined
description: By week 11, your baby continues to grow and develop rapidly. Organs are now functioning, and features like fingers, toes, and facial structures are becoming more refined.
what_to_expect: Organs continue to develop and start functioning more actively
Fingers and toes are fully separated
Symptoms like nausea and fatigue may begin to ease for some individuals
care_tips: Maintain a balanced diet with a variety of nutrients
Stay hydrated and continue regular meal patterns
Get enough rest and begin light activity if comfortable

medical_checkups.note: This stage may involve early screening and continued monitoring.

commonly_suggested.name: First Trimester Screening
commonly_suggested.purpose: Assesses risk of certain chromosomal conditions

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may recommend screening tests based on your age, medical history, and preferences.

important_note: Your baby is becoming more developed, with many structures now clearly formed.
reassurance: You are nearing the end of the first trimester, and progress is steadily continuing.
medical_disclaimer: Discuss any screening options and results with your healthcare provider.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports continued development and reduces risks.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be monitored closely during screening and checkups.
diabetes.reassurance: Consistent management helps support a healthy pregnancy.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support increased blood volume and fetal growth.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports healthy circulation and fetal development.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during prenatal visits.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and consistent routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing growth and development.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be reviewed during routine checkups.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As you approach the end of the first trimester, managing multiple conditions requires steady attention and routine care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady care supports continued healthy progress.
